expression: IF OUT-STATUS = 'A' AND OUT-TOTAL-GERAL > 5000000 THEN 'VIP' ELSE IF OUT-STATUS = 'A' THEN 'ATV' ELSE 'BLQ'

expression: IF OUT-TOTAL-GERAL > 7000000 THEN 'A1' ELSE IF OUT-TOTAL-GERAL > 2000000 THEN 'B1' ELSE 'C1'

expression: IF OUT-OCORRENCIA = '000' AND OUT-STATUS = 'A' THEN 'N' ELSE 'S'

expression: IF IN3-TIPO-CLIENTE = 'P' AND P1-ALERTA = 'N' AND IN3-FLAG-BLOQUEIO <> 'S' THEN 'APROVAR' ELSE IF IN3-FLAG-BLOQUEIO = 'S' THEN 'BLOQUEAR' ELSE IF MATCH THEN 'ANALISAR' ELSE 'MANUAL'
